name: free-ai-forever
description: A free, local AI chat app that runs on your own computer, powered by Ollama.
author: Matthew Bailie

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --win
